title: Day 3 Lesson 3 - Video Repetition 1
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these two sentences:  

Sentence 1 - このれいぞうこはどこのですか。 (Kono reezooko wa doko no deska?) = Where is this fridge from?

Sentence 2 - ちゅうごくのです。(Chuugoku no des) = It's from China.

How to use this lesson - Please watch the video twice (first with the subtitles and then without them) and repeat the sentences.
